evidence: packages/access-control/src/index.ts defines PolicyRequest, PolicyEvaluation, PolicyTargetRef, and deterministic evaluatePolicy with safe trace output

Policy evaluator denies tenant mismatch before target identity appears in trace, denies unsupported requested scopes and raw stored unsupported scope rules with unsupported_scope, denies inactive profiles and missing permissions, and evaluates own/project/tenant/all scopes

packages/access-control/src/policyEvaluator.test.ts covers allow by tenant scope, missing permission, safe tenant mismatch, own/project/tenant/all scope behavior, own/project mismatch, unsupported department requested scope, unsupported raw stored team scope, inactive profile, and requested scope not granted

evidence: packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts defines TenantConfiguration, TenantLabelSet, TenantLabelChangeTrace, createTenantConfiguration, createTenantLabelSet, updateTenantLabel, and resolveTenantLabel

Tenant label updates are immutable, reject stale expectedConfigurationVersion values, increment configurationVersion, and return previous/current configuration version plus changed key/before/after labels for later API/audit DTOs
resolveTenantLabel requires configured runtime labels or an explicit fallback so internal label keys are not silently exposed to users

apps/web/src/App.tsx reads navigation, role, shell prefix, aria, and shell placeholder labels from a TenantLabelSet; apps/web/src/App.test.tsx proves runtime label overrides change visible navigation, role, tenant/config/user prefixes, and navigation aria label without changing component text literals

evidence: packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts defines metadata-only CustomFieldDefinition, CustomFieldRegistry, CustomFieldBindingFlags, validation/visibility/permission metadata, supported target entity types, supported value types, and optimistic metadata update result
Custom field definitions are tenant-owned, versioned, use stable keys, preserve valueType/target/key during metadata updates, and reject unsupported target entity types and value types

createCustomFieldRegistry revalidates deserialized definitions, rejects cross-tenant definitions, rejects duplicate keys for the same target entity type, and allows the same key on different target entity types
updateCustomFieldDefinitionMetadata rejects stale expectedVersion values, increments definition version, clones metadata, and does not mutate the input definition
Validation-rule metadata accepts only string, number, boolean, homogeneous string arrays, or homogeneous number arrays, rejecting raw objects and mixed arrays from deserialized input

packages/tenant-config/src/customFields.test.ts covers valid definitions, duplicate keys, invalid target/value/version/tenant inputs, invalid raw validation metadata, metadata update version handling, and typed TenantConfigModelError failures

evidence: packages/domain-core/src/index.ts defines AuditTargetRef, AuditEvent, AuditEventDetails, AuditResult, createAuditTargetRef, and createAuditEvent

Audit events are tenant-owned, require actor, tenant, actionKey, target, result, timestamp, and correlationId, validate success/denied/failed results, validate timestamps, and clone details to protect append-oriented history from caller mutations

packages/domain-core/src/auditPrimitives.test.ts covers audit event creation, missing required fields, required actor correlationId, invalid results, detail cloning, and typed DomainInvariantError validation failures

apps/api/src/auditLog.ts defines a deterministic in-memory audit event store for Phase 2 service tests with append, duplicate-id rejection, tenant-scoped readback, insertion order preservation, and cloned read/write boundaries
apps/api/src/auditLog.test.ts covers tenant-scoped audit readback, append-only history isolation from caller mutations, duplicate audit IDs, and invalid tenant readback requests

evidence: apps/api/src/app.ts implements GET /tenants/current, GET /admin/access-profiles, POST /admin/access-profiles, POST /admin/labels, POST /admin/permissions/evaluate, GET /tenant-isolation-probes/:probeId, GET /audit/events, and POST /test-fixtures/reset

apps/api/src/app.ts validates POST bodies with Zod, establishes fixture actor/tenant context from testUser, applies server-side policy checks through @kiss-pm/access-control, returns stable DTO field names, and keeps fixture reset behind createApiApp({ allowTestFixtureReset: true })
apps/api/src/phase2Runtime.ts creates deterministic Phase 2 in-memory runtime state from shared demo tenants, Phase 2 access profiles, runtime label sets, tenant isolation probes, and audit store
Successful access profile upserts and tenant label updates append tenant-scoped audit events with actor, tenant, target, action key, timestamp, correlation ID, and before/after details

apps/api/src/phase2Api.test.ts covers current tenant DTO, tenant-scoped profile list/upsert, label update version trace and stale conflict, read-only direct mutation denial with no success audit, safe tenant mismatch diagnostics, cross-tenant probe not_found without Tenant B private detail leakage, known diagnostic target-id resolution, unknown label-key and inherited label-key rejection before state/audit writes, and test fixture reset gating

evidence: apps/web/src/App.tsx implements a minimal Russian Phase 2 admin surface inside the existing shell for access profiles, tenant label editing, permission diagnostics, tenant isolation probe readback, audit evidence, and read-only denial state
apps/web/src/phase2ApiClient.ts defines stable DTO/client methods for the P2 API routes and apps/web/vite.config.ts proxies /api to the local API server during dev and E2E

apps/web/src/App.test.tsx covers admin profile creation with audit refresh, tenant label mutation with runtime label refresh and audit trace, read-only mutation control denial, safe cross-tenant probe denial without Tenant B leakage, Tenant B own/foreign probe selection, and API load-error rendering
e2e/tests/phase2 implements E2E-010 through E2E-014 using real browser UI actions plus direct API readback for permissions, persisted/API state, audit, tenant isolation, and reload behavior
scripts/run-e2e.mjs serializes phase and all profiles while Phase 2 uses shared in-memory state, preventing false conflicts between mutable E2E scenarios

Rendered browser sanity via Playwright MCP opened http://127.0.0.1:5173/?testUser=tenant-admin-a with fixture auth; desktop and mobile snapshots were nonblank, showed the Phase 2 surface, had no framework overlay, and console output contained only React DevTools info

evidence: packages/shared-test-fixtures/src/phase2Fixtures.ts defines a deterministic Phase 2 seed with fixed timestamp, Tenant A/B users, Tenant A/B private isolation probes, tenant label sets, tenant-owned access profile seeds, and an empty audit baseline

getPhase2FixtureSeed returns deep clones so scenario mutation cannot contaminate the next reset; getPhase2ProbePairForTenant derives own/foreign probe IDs from seeded tenants instead of hardcoding UI behavior
apps/api/src/phase2Runtime.ts now builds profiles and label sets from the shared Phase 2 fixture seed while keeping runtime mutations in isolated in-memory state
apps/api/src/server.ts enables POST /test-fixtures/reset only when KISS_PM_ALLOW_TEST_FIXTURE_RESET=true; playwright.config.ts sets that env only for E2E API webServer

e2e/tests/phase2/helpers.ts adds resetPhase2Fixtures and every Phase 2 scenario resets before execution; fixture-reset.spec.ts mutates profile, label, and audit state then resets and verifies label version, profile list, and audit log return to seed baseline
docs/e2e/E2E_SCENARIOS.md marks E2E-010 through E2E-014 as passing after Phase 2 acceptance tests

Code review found an Important direct-Playwright concurrency/config path risk; playwright.config.ts now sets workers: 1, e2e/tests/phase2/helpers.ts uses the config default API port, and the web server receives PW_API_PORT for direct Playwright runs
Code review Minor Tenant B reset readback gap was fixed in fixture-reset.spec.ts by verifying Tenant B current tenant labels and private probe after reset
